settings.title: Settings
settings.enableConnection: Enable the connection to synchronize activities.
settings.comingSoonDesc: Coming soon — Integration will be available soon.
settings.deleteAccountMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently delete all your data, including activities, workouts, and settings. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountWithSubscriptionStripe: You have an active Stripe subscription. It will be canceled automatically when you delete your account.
settings.deleteAccountWithSubscriptionAppStore: You have an active subscription purchased through the Apple App Store. Please cancel it manually in your iPhone Settings > [Your Name] > Subscriptions before deleting your account, or it will continue to renew.
settings.deleteAccountWithSubscriptionPlayStore: You have an active subscription purchased through the Google Play Store. Please cancel it manually in your Play Store settings before deleting your account, or it will continue to renew.
settings.deleteAccountSuccessMessage: Your account has been successfully deleted.
settings.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.manageSubscriptionAppStore: You have an App Store subscription. To cancel it, go to Settings > [Your Name] > Subscriptions on your iPhone.
settings.manageSubscriptionPlayStore: You have a Play Store subscription. To cancel it, open the Google Play Store app and go to Menu > Subscriptions.
settings.dangerZoneWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

garmin.disconnectMessage: Are you sure you want to disconnect Garmin?

garmin.activityExportPermissionMissing: To download activities, you need to grant ACTIVITY_EXPORT permission. Update your permissions in Garmin Connect settings or reconnect your account.
